parameter.name: PublicOriginUri
parameter.description: Used to identify the Identity server URI

parameter.name: IssuerUri
parameter.description: Used to identify the identity server used

parameter.name: ReturnUri
parameter.description: Used to identify the Unity UI

parameter.name: LogFilePath
parameter.description: Used to store the path of the Identity server log file

parameter.name: IdentityServerSigningCertThumbprint
parameter.description: The thumbprint of the SSL certificate to use with IdentityServer

parameter.name: LandingAPIUri
parameter.description: Used to store the uri for the Unity APIs

parameter.name: CspOptions.ScriptSrcAdditional
parameter.description: Used to store valid Content Security Policy script urls

parameter.name: CspOptions.StyleSrcAdditional
parameter.description: Used to store valid Content Security Policy style urls

parameter.name: CspOptions.FontSrcAdditional
parameter.description: Used to store valid Content Security Policy font urls

parameter.name: CspOptions.ConnectSrcAdditional
parameter.description: Used to store valid Content Security Policy connect source urls

parameter.name: CspOptions.FrameSrcAdditional
parameter.description: Used to store valid Content Security Policy frame urls

parameter.name: OrgMasterId
parameter.description: Used to store the RealPage blue book company id

parameter.name: Environment
parameter.description: Unity environment

parameter.name: ElasticSearchUri
parameter.description: URL for Elastic Search

parameter.name: ElasticSearchAuthDetails
parameter.description: Authentication details for Elastic Search

parameter.name: LogPath
parameter.description: Path to use for file logging

parameter.name: LogProductName
parameter.description: Product name to use for logging

parameter.name: ElasticSearchIndexTypeName
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing

parameter.name: ShouldWriteInFile
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing

parameter.name: ShouldLogPerformance
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing

parameter.name: ShouldLogDiagnostic
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing

parameter.name: ActivityMQName
parameter.description: Product name to use for elastic search indexing
